headline: Meta won’t have to face the next planned social media addiction trial
summary: Meta will not face the next planned social media addiction trial. The 15-year-old Florida plaintiff dropped the case. This was set to be the second bellwether trial.

headline: Tesla’s revenues are bouncing back, but profits are still weak
summary: Tesla's revenues are recovering after two years of weak demand. Despite impressive deliveries, Q2 2026 profits remain low. The company continues its road to recovery post-Musk's brand damage.

headline: Price-hiked iPads are a little cheaper right now
summary: Select Apple iPads are currently on sale despite recent price increases. The 13-inch iPad Pro M5 with 512GB is $150 off at Amazon. Deals offer savings on high-end Apple products.

headline: iOS code could reportedly let Apple cut off apps when users miss iPhone payments
summary: iOS 27 beta code suggests Apple could implement a 'Restricted Mode.' This mode would activate if users miss iPhone financing payments. It may be linked to a new 'Apple Upgrade' program.

headline: Save $1,500 Off an Alienware Area-51 Ryzen X3D Gaming PC With RTX 5090 GPU and 64GB of RAM
summary: Save $1,500 on an Alienware Area-51 Ryzen X3D Gaming PC. It features an RTX 5090 GPU and 64GB of RAM. This is a competitive price for an extremely powerful gaming PC.

headline: Samsung Galaxy Z Fold 8 Ultra Review So Far
summary: The Samsung Galaxy Z Fold 8 Ultra is the latest flagship foldable. It boasts improved battery and camera performance. However, its $2099 price tag is a major drawback.

headline: Save $100 Off a Like New Asus ROG Xbox Ally X Handheld Gaming PC at Best Buy
summary: Save $100 on a 'like new' Asus ROG Xbox Ally X. This is the most powerful Windows-based gaming handheld. The deal is available at Best Buy.

headline: Best Buy's Trio of Exclusive Limited Edition Xbox Elite Series 2 Core Controllers Are on Sale Today
summary: Best Buy is selling exclusive Limited Edition Xbox Elite Series 2 Core Controllers. These controllers are preconfigured using Xbox's Design Lab service. The special trio is on sale today.

headline: PC Harper's widow criticises early prisoner release plan as Burnham to review scheme
summary: PC Harper's widow, Lissie Harper, criticizes early prisoner release plans. Reports suggest two of PC Harper's killers could be freed early. Burnham will review the controversial scheme.

headline: Most bus fares in England to be capped at £2 from January
summary: Most bus fares in England will be capped at £2 starting January. The government aims to help with the cost of living. This policy provides financial breathing space for commuters.

headline: Ukrainian drones hit Russian online giant retailer Wildberries for second time
summary: Ukrainian drones struck Russian online retailer Wildberries again. Logistics hubs in Krasnodar and Stavropol regions were hit overnight. This marks the second attack on the e-commerce giant.

headline: Ex-Southern Water boss among four charged over alleged plan to manipulate water quality tests
summary: Former Southern Water boss, Matthew Wright, is among four charged. They face allegations of manipulating water quality tests. The alleged scheme aimed to save the firm millions in penalties.
